Datatable column details: {"dt_bi": null, "dt_bm": null, "dt_js": null, "dt_key": null, "dt_ajax": "api/SZ_SETUPANDMAINTENANCE_LETTERPHRASE_API?LetterPhrase=1", "dt_post": null, "dt_sort": null, "dt_bInfo": "false", "dt_class": null, "dt_print": "false", "dt_filter": "default", "dt_bRefresh": "false", "dt_bPaginate": "false", "dt_saveState": "false", "dt_pageLength": "", "dt_aLengthMenu": "5,10,25,50,100", "dt_freeze_left": "0", "dt_freeze_right": "0", "dt_bLengthChange": "false"}
Business Logic (BL) Details:
<?php

include 'userinfo.php';

if($_GET['dt_list']){

	//============================================================ common filter
	$common = "	from ".DB2.".lookup_parameter_main where 
	            lpm_code='PHRASE'
	";
	
	//============================================================ record count
	$sqlcount = "SELECT COUNT(*) C $common";
	$recordsFiltered = executeQueryV2($sqlcount)[0]['C'];

	//============================================================ main sql
	$sql = "select lpm_value , 
	               lpm_value_desc_bm , 
				   lpm_value_desc , 
				   lpm_code
			$common
			ORDER BY {$_POST['orderBy'][0]} {$_POST['orderBy'][1]}
			LIMIT ".$_POST['start'].", ".$_POST['length']."
	";
	$data = executeQueryV2($sql);

	//============================================================ finally
	return [
		'draw' => $_POST['draw'],
		'recordsFiltered' => $recordsFiltered,
		'data' => $data
	];

}

if ($_GET['phraseinfo']){
	// var_dump($_GET['lpm_value']);
	// die();
	// ============================================================ main sql
    $sql = "select lpm_value lpm_value, 
	               lpm_value_desc_bm lpm_value_desc_bm, 
				   lpm_value_desc lpm_value_desc
            from ".DB2.".lookup_parameter_main where lpm_code= ?
    ";
    $rsdata = executeQueryV2($sql,[$_GET['lpm_value']])[0];

    return [   
		'LPM_VALUE' 			=> $rsdata['lpm_value'],
		'LPM_VALUE_DESC_BM' 	=> $rsdata['lpm_value_desc_bm'],
		'LPM_VALUE_DESC' 		=> $rsdata['lpm_value_desc']
	];
}

//=================================== process med
if($_GET['save_med']){

    $sqlsave = "UPDATE ".DB2.".lookup_parameter_main
						  SET 
							lpm_value_desc_bm 	= ?,
							lpm_value_desc 		= ?
							WHERE LPM_VALUE = ?
			";
		$rssave = executeQueryV2($sqlsave, [$_POST['detail']['lpm_value_desc_bm'], $_POST['detail']['lpm_value_desc'], $_POST['detail']['lpm_value']]);

		return[
			"status" => "ok",
			'successmessage' => 'Succesfully update your data.'
    	];


}
